name: Purpose of the 7 Sacraments

VINIT.justification: The initial void/uninitialized state before receiving grace.

TANCH.justification: The closed boundary that contains the whole system of divine fullness.

AFWD.justification: Directed transformation toward the target of divine union.

AREV.justification: Reverse/descent transformation into the material realm.

IMSCRIB.chosen_element: The recognition of the divine spark
IMSCRIB.justification: Self-reference, the spark recognizing its origin.

FSPLIT.chosen_element: The separation of spirit and matter
FSPLIT.justification: Splits the soul's trajectory into the path of light and the path of darkness.

FFUSE.justification: Reconstitutes the original divine unity from the separated paths.

EVALT.justification: Affirmative branch, success in the sacrament.

EVALF.justification: Negative branch, failure to receive the seal.

ENGAGR.justification: Both simultaneously held (divine and material, light and darkness).

IFIX.justification: Permanent, append-only record of the sacramental grace received.

phase_2.split_element: The separation of spirit and matter
phase_2.split_input: The soul bearing the light-spark in matter
split_outputs: the path of spirit (land of light)
the path of matter (land of death)
phase_2.fuse_result: The unified divine spark in the Pleroma (the original monad)

phase_3.void_description: The soul trapped in non-existent matter, devoid of grace, before the first sacrament.
phase_3.true_description: The soul illuminated, sealed, and dwelling in the land of light and eternal life.
phase_3.false_description: The soul remaining in the darkness of matter, captive and impoverished.
phase_3.both_description: The incarnate state of the light-spark, simultaneously divine (light) and trapped (darkness/matter).

steps.domain_action: The soul exists in the void of non-existent matter.
The light-spark descends into the material realm.
The soul's trajectory is split into the path of spirit (T) and the path of matter (F).
The T-arm anchors the affirmative path of receiving sacramental grace.
The first seal (Baptism) is permanently recorded, washing the matter.
The second sacrament (Confirmation) chains to the first, strengthening the spark.
The third sacrament (Eucharist) chains to the sequence, feeding the soul with divine light.
The fourth sacrament (Penance) chains to the sequence, purifying the soul.
The fifth sacrament (Anointing) chains to the sequence, healing the soul's wounds.
The sixth sacrament (Holy Orders) chains to the sequence, empowering the soul.
The seventh sacrament (Matrimony/Union) chains to the sequence, uniting the soul with the divine.
The soul moves forward through the final gate into the Pleroma.
The F-arm anchors the negative path of remaining captive in the land of death.
The paths are resolved, fusing the purified soul back into the original unity of the Pleroma.
The soul holds the paradice of the light-darkness, simultaneously divine and incarnate.
The soul recognizes itself as the light-spark, achieving self-knowledge.
The soul reaches the ineffable Father, the terminal boundary of the system.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The divine will and command of the Father
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: The creative word and the light-spark
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The seals, crowns, and permanent records of the sacraments
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The ordinance of the hidden aeons and the progression through the 7 gates
phase_5.alfs_store: The ineffable Father, the first source and deep of the All

phase_6.cycle_cost: The agitation of the pleroma and the descent into matter
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The soul in the void of non-existent matter
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The soul unified and liberated in the Pleroma
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The sacramental cycle conserves the divine light, merely transforming its state from captive to liberated without loss of the original spark.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → AREV → FSPLIT → EVALT → IFIX → CLINK → CLINK → CLINK → CLINK → CLINK → CLINK → AFWD → EVALF → FFUSE → ENGAGR → IMSCRIB → TANCH
-- Class: Purpose of the 7 Sacraments
-- Fingerprint: sig=(11,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=17
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(2, 13)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑗  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑼 → 𐑚  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [2] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [3] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [4] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑚 → 𐑙  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [5] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [6] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [7] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [8] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [9] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [10] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [11] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [12] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [13] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑳  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [14] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑙 → 𐑠  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [15] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑳 → 𐑡  | identity — self-imscription
--   [16] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑠 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def purpose_of_the_7_sacraments_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑗)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The soul exists in the void of non-existent matter.)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [1] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (The light-spark descends into the material realm.)
  -- FSPLIT [2] (gran := 𐑚) (The soul's trajectory is split into the path of spirit (T) and the path of matter (F).) / FFUSE [13] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (9 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [3] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The T-arm anchors the affirmative path of receiving sacramental grace.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑭 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The first seal (Baptism) is permanently recorded, washing the matter.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The second sacrament (Confirmation) chains to the first, strengthening the sp...)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The third sacrament (Eucharist) chains to the sequence, feeding the soul with...)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The fourth sacrament (Penance) chains to the sequence, purifying the soul.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The fifth sacrament (Anointing) chains to the sequence, healing the soul's wo...)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [9] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The sixth sacrament (Holy Orders) chains to the sequence, empowering the soul.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [10] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The seventh sacrament (Matrimony/Union) chains to the sequence, uniting the s...)
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [11] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The soul moves forward through the final gate into the Pleroma.)
      -- F-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [12] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The F-arm anchors the negative path of remaining captive in the land of death.))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [13]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [13] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The paths are resolved, fusing the purified soul back into the original unity of the Pleroma.)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑙 𐑠)  -- [14] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The soul holds the paradice of the light-darkness, simultaneously divine and ...)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑳 𐑡)  -- [15] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The soul recognizes itself as the light-spark, achieving self-knowledge.)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑠 𐑼)  -- [16] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The soul reaches the ineffable Father, the terminal boundary of the system.)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def purpose_of_the_7_sacraments_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (purpose_of_the_7_sacraments_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def purpose_of_the_7_sacraments_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (purpose_of_the_7_sacraments_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem purpose_of_the_7_sacraments_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
